# Default example

Minimal default example for the alz-corp GitHub runners module.

```hcl
module "corp_runners" {
  source = "../.."

  container_app_subnet_id                       = var.container_app_subnet_id
  container_registry_private_endpoint_subnet_id = var.container_registry_private_endpoint_subnet_id
  location                                      = var.location
  postfix                                       = "corpaca"
  version_control_system_organization           = var.github_organization
  version_control_system_type                   = "github"
  container_registry_dns_zone_id                = var.container_registry_dns_zone_id
  tags = {
    workload   = "corp-aca-runners"
    managed-by = "terraform"
  }
  version_control_system_authentication_method = "pat"
  version_control_system_personal_access_token = var.github_personal_access_token
  version_control_system_repository            = var.github_repository
}
```

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (>= 1.9.0)

- <a name="requirement_azurerm"></a> [azurerm](#requirement\_azurerm) (~> 4.20)

## Resources

No resources.

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
## Required Inputs

The following input variables are required:

### <a name="input_container_app_subnet_id"></a> [container\_app\_subnet\_id](#input\_container\_app\_subnet\_id)

Description: Existing delegated subnet for the internal Container App Environment.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_container_registry_private_endpoint_subnet_id"></a> [container\_registry\_private\_endpoint\_subnet\_id](#input\_container\_registry\_private\_endpoint\_subnet\_id)

Description: Existing private endpoint subnet for ACR.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_github_personal_access_token"></a> [github\_personal\_access\_token](#input\_github\_personal\_access\_token)

Description: GitHub token with self-hosted runner registration permissions.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_subscription_id"></a> [subscription\_id](#input\_subscription\_id)

Description: Corp runner landing zone subscription ID.

Type: `string`

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_container_registry_dns_zone_id"></a> [container\_registry\_dns\_zone\_id](#input\_container\_registry\_dns\_zone\_id)

Description: Optional existing privatelink.azurecr.io private DNS zone ID.

Type: `string`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_github_organization"></a> [github\_organization](#input\_github\_organization)

Description: GitHub organization for runner registration.

Type: `string`

Default: `"alz-avm-tf-demo"`

### <a name="input_github_repository"></a> [github\_repository](#input\_github\_repository)

Description: GitHub repository for repository-scoped runners.

Type: `string`

Default: `"alz-aca-runners"`

### <a name="input_location"></a> [location](#input\_location)

Description: Azure region.

Type: `string`

Default: `"swedencentral"`

## Outputs

No outputs.

The following Modules are called:
